d:
Passive. Zanie has her max HP reduced by [[15%]]. When a battle starts, she deploys 2 laser turrets, that inherit [[140%]] of her max HP and [[80%]] of her ATK. These turrets are immobile and [[unaffected]]. Each turret fires lasers at random enemies within 5 tiles, dealing damage equal to [[100%]] of the laser turret's ATK. If the 2 turrets start the battle within [[2]] tiles of each other, they become linked, combining their energy to fire at the nearest enemy, dealing damage equal to [[55%]] of the laser turrets' total ATK every [[0.5]]s. This combined attack also reduces the target's shield value by up to [[30%]] of the laser turrets' total ATK.

Active. Zanie increases ATK SPD by [[15]] and ATK by [[20%]] for herself and her laser turrets for [[10]]s. During this time, laser turret attacks deal extra damage equal to [[3%]] of the target's current HP, up to [[60%]] of the laser turret's ATK.
When actively used, increases ATK SPD by [[20]].
When actively used, increases ATK SPD by [[25]].
When actively used, increases ATK SPD by [[30]].
When actively used, increases ATK SPD by [[35]].

Passive. When a battle starts, Zanie builds a gun turret in front of her. The turret inherits [[70%]] of her max HP and ATK. Its normal attack has a range of 3 tiles and deals damage equal to [[100%]] of the gun turret's ATK, prioritizing the enemy closest to any laser turret. After [[2]] normal attacks, the gun turret charges up its next attack into a devastating heavy barrage that fires 6 consecutive rounds at the enemy. Each round deals damage equal to [[50%]] of the gun turret's ATK, stuns the enemy for [[0.5]]s, and knocks them back.
The gun turret now inherits [[75%]] of Zanie's max HP and ATK.
The gun turret now inherits [[80%]] of Zanie's max HP and ATK.
The gun turret now inherits [[85%]] of Zanie's max HP and ATK.

Passive. When her gun turret is destroyed, Zanie moves to its remains to fully repair it and grant it a shield that can block [[500%]]<ATK> damage. She then returns to her original position. This effect can only be triggered once per battle.
Active. Zanie moves to the [[weakest]] laser turret to repair it, restoring [[300%]]<ATK> HP and granting it a shield that blocks [[500%]]<ATK> damage. Zanie then returns to her original position.
When actively used, increases HP restored to a turret to [[350%]]<ATK>.
When actively used, increases HP restored to a turret to [[400%]]<ATK>.
When actively used, increases HP restored to a turret to [[450%]]<ATK>.
Increases Penetration by [[12]] during battle.
Increases Penetration by [[16]] during battle.
Increases Penetration by [[20]] during battle.

Every [[22]]s, Zanie upgrades one of her turrets, increasing its max HP and ATK by [[40%]] and expanding its range by [[1]] tiles. She will prioritize upgrading the frontmost laser turret. Each turret can only be upgraded once per battle.
Max HP and ATK boosts for upgraded turrets are increased to [[50%]].
Reduces this skill's cooldown to [[15]]s.
Max HP and ATK boosts for upgraded turrets are increased to [[60%]].

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, each normal attack increases ATK SPD by [[2]] and normal attack damage by [[1%]], stacking up to [[10]] times.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Healing, 25 Assistance.

d: When a laser turret hits an enemy, it burns them, reducing their ATK by [[20%]] and dealing damage equal to [[100%]] of the turret's ATK per second for [[5]]s. The burn effect cannot stack. If the turret is linked to the other laser turret, the burn effect also reduces the enemy's Phys DEF by [[30%]].
